title: Tasty Velvety Greek Prawns Tzatziki
description: A winey and velvety Greek dish featuring raw frozen prawns in a tzatziki sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This kosher-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the yogurt, garlic, vinegar, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Add the grated cucumber to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Fold in the thawed prawns and chopped fresh dill until the prawns are fully coated with the tzatziki sauce.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top of the prawns and sauce, and stir gently to combine.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the prawns chilled, garnished with additional chopped fresh dill if desired.
This dish can be made ahead of time and stored in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
Before serving, give the prawns a good stir and adjust the seasoning if necessary.
